creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: danilo
Date: Fri Jan  3 00:08:56 2014
New Revision: 338508
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/338508

Log:
  - Update from 2.33 to 2.34
  - Use options helpers
  
  PR:	ports/185321
  Submitted by:	KATO Tsuguru <tkato432@yahoo.com>

Modified:
  head/science/gwyddion/Makefile
  head/science/gwyddion/distinfo
  head/science/gwyddion/pkg-plist

Modified: head/science/gwyddion/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/science/gwyddion/Makefile	Fri Jan  3 00:02:08 2014	(r338507)
+++ head/science/gwyddion/Makefile	Fri Jan  3 00:08:56 2014	(r338508)
@@ -2,8 +2,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	gwyddion
-PORTVERSION=	2.33
-PORTREVISION=	2
+PORTVERSION=	2.34
 CATEGORIES=	science graphics
 MASTER_SITES=	SF
 
@@ -38,23 +37,15 @@ LDFLAGS+=	-L${LOCALBASE}/lib
 
 GCONF_SCHEMAS=	gwyddion-thumbnailer.schemas
 
-PERL_CONFIGURE_OFF=	--without-perl
+PERL_CONFIGURE_WITH=	perl
 PERL_USES=		perl5
-PYTHON_CONFIGURE_OFF=	--without-python
-RUBY_CONFIGURE_OFF=	--without-ruby
-UNIQUE_CONFIGURE_OFF=	--without-unique
+PYTHON_CONFIGURE_WITH=	python
+PYTHON_USE=		PYTHON=yes
+RUBY_CONFIGURE_WITH=	ruby
+RUBY_USE=		RUBY=yes
+UNIQUE_CONFIGURE_WITH=	unique
 UNIQUE_LIB_DEPENDS=	libunique-1.0.so:${PORTSDIR}/x11-toolkits/unique
 
-.include <bsd.port.options.mk>
-
-.if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MPYTHON}
-USE_PYTHON=	yes
-.endif
-
-.if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MRUBY}
-USE_RUBY=	yes
-.endif
-
 post-patch:
 	@${REINPLACE_CMD} -e \
 		's|thumbnailer \\|thumbnailer| ; \

Modified: head/science/gwyddion/distinfo
==============================================================================
